title: Profiles on PositiveSingles.com dating website turn up on other affiliated dating websites
summary: Three individuals posted their dating profiles (with names, photos, medical condition, etc.) on PositiveSingles.com, a seemingly confidential dating website dedicated to individuals who have tested positive for a sexually transmitted disease (STD). Later, they noticed that their profiles also showed up on nearly 60 other dating sites that...
dedupKey: profiles on positivesingles com dating website turn up on other affiliated dating websites|2013-07-11
